description_long: This is a modern residential property featuring two distinct house structures within a fenced, landscaped lot. The main house is two stories tall with a dark gable roof, white and gray exterior walls, and large rectangular windows arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern. The secondary structure is a single-story building with a similar color palette and a sloped roof, likely serving as a garage or guest house. The property includes a paved driveway, a red car, and several trees and shrubs distributed throughout the yard. The lot is bordered by a low fence and surrounded by a grass lawn, with a curved road providing access. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a focus on functional outdoor space.
description: A modern two-story house with a secondary single-story building, set on a landscaped lot with a driveway, car, and trees. The property features clean lines, large windows, and a fenced grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing both the main two-story house and the single-story building, with the driveway, car, and main entrance visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the back and side of the main house, with the yard and landscaping more prominent.
description_view_2: Side view focusing on the single-story building and the open grassy area, with the driveway and road access visible.
description_view_3: Top-down angled view emphasizing the layout of the buildings, driveway, and the overall lot shape.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large rectangular windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a simple door with a small overhang, paved steps, and minimal decorative elements.
